description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish tote from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsBrown bag with one main zippered compartmentSlot seams in front with shimmer fabric insertsTop stitched band near the mouth of the bag with button detailInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsOne zippered pocket and branding at backTwo short handles with buckled loops for carrying easeMaterial and CareFabric, syntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 36 cmWidth: 35 cmDepth: 10 cm
